name: Scott Walker
subject: This can’t be correct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
| | ****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1NDI5MDES1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQyNTk2NTY2S0&mt=1&rt=0) Peter,

I just heard from our finance staff that you have not yet become a Charter Member. I understand that times are tough and plenty of campaigns and organizations are asking for your help, but we would really appreciate you joining our team as a Charter Member. [Please consider becoming a Charter Member now. ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI1NDI5MDES1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQyNTk2NTY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Our American Revival is a movement. We believe that the best government is one closest to the people. We believe that it is the American taxpayer that holds the power, not government bureaucrats. We are fighting for big, bold reforms, like the ones I instituted in Wisconsin. We can bring true change to Washington, but we need your help. [Please become a Charter Member today.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1NDI5MDES1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQyNTk2NTY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you for your consideration,

Governor Scott Walker

[

](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1NDI5MDES1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQyNTk2NTY2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
